data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Lose Steam, Trader Warns Of 'New Lows' Under One Condition
data.description: The crypto market is showing signs of cooling after a sharp rally on Wednesday.

data.title: Tech Stocks Slip As Market Reverses Post-Tariff Rally: What's Going On?
data.description: Shares of major technology companies, including Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL), Advanced Micro Devices Inc.(NASDAQ: AMD) and Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOGL) are trading lower Thursday following a broader market pullback after Wednesday's sharp rally.

data.title: Trump Averts Financial Crisis With Tariff Pause, But Not A Recession: Josh Brown
data.description: Trump paused the reciprocal tariff plan, but CNBC's Josh Brown believes gains were a blip and a recession could still occur.

data.title: SoftBank Bets $200M On CMR Surgical, The UK Startup Taking On $178B Intuitive With Robots That Have Performed 30,000 Surgeries
Amazon and McDonald's Lead XLY Pullback As Consumer Stocks Dip After Tariff-Driven Rally
data.description: XLY slipped Thursday as investors took profits following Wednesday's tariff-driven consumer stock rally. Cooling inflation supported sentiment, but Amazon, Tesla, and others retreated after sharp previous gains.
